items.title_en: South Korea unveils $1tn chip and AI investment plan
items.title_zh: 韩国公布1万亿美元芯片和人工智能投资计划
items.desc_en: It comes as regional rivals like Taiwan, China and Japan are investing heavily in chip factories and other technology.
items.desc_zh: 与此同时，台湾、中国和日本等地区竞争对手正在大力投资芯片工厂和其他技术。

items.title_en: Goldman Sachs says stick with Asia's winners, keep diversifying into commodities
items.title_zh: 高盛表示坚持亚洲赢家，继续多元化进军大宗商品
items.desc_en: Asian stocks still have room to run even after a blistering first-half rally, while investors should continue diversifying into commodities, said Goldman Sachs.
items.desc_zh: 高盛表示，即使在上半年大幅上涨之后，亚洲股市仍有上涨空间，而投资者应继续投资大宗商品。

items.title_en: The AI boom is colliding with a new threat: severe weather
items.title_zh: 人工智能的繁荣正与新的威胁相冲突：恶劣天气
items.desc_en: Heatwaves and severe weather are raising risks for AI data centers, from grid strain to higher insurance and repair costs.
items.desc_zh: 热浪和恶劣天气正在增加人工智能数据中心的风险，从电网压力到更高的保险和维修成本。

items.title_en: China widens Japan export curbs, targeting drone makers, nuclear firms and defense institutes
items.title_zh: 中国扩大对日本的出口限制，针对无人机制造商、核公司和国防机构
items.desc_en: China blacklisted four of Japan's government defense research institutes and placed dozens more Japanese firms under tightened export restrictions Monday.
items.desc_zh: 周一，中国将四家日本政府防务研究机构列入黑名单，并对数十家日本公司实施更严格的出口限制。

items.title_en: Pakistan launches deadly strikes along Afghan border
items.title_zh: 巴基斯坦沿阿富汗边境发动致命袭击
items.desc_en: Pakistan says its strikes were a response to "recent terrorist attacks against innocent people".
items.desc_zh: 巴基斯坦表示，其袭击是对“最近针对无辜人民的恐怖袭击”的回应。

items.title_en: Baidu shares jump 7% as AI chip arm Kunlunxin said to target $50 billion Hong Kong IPO
items.title_zh: 人工智能芯片公司昆仑欣计划在香港IPO，融资规模达500亿美元 百度股价大涨7%
items.desc_en: Baidu's Hong Kong-listed shares rose over 6% amid reports that its AI chip unit Kunlunxin is targeting a $50 billion initial public offering in the city.
items.desc_zh: 百度在香港上市的股价上涨超过 6%，有报道称其人工智能芯片子公司昆仑欣计划在香港进行 500 亿美元的首次公开募股。

items.title_en: Bitcoin at ‘critical technical battleground' with potential 30% further drop, strategists say
items.title_zh: 策略师表示，比特币处于“关键技术战场”，可能进一步下跌 30%
items.desc_en: Bitcoin's $60,000 level will be critical to watch in the coming months, one strategist says. Another sees downside to $40,000.
items.desc_zh: 一位策略师表示，未来几个月比特币 60,000 美元的水平将是值得关注的关键。另一位则认为下跌至 40,000 美元。

items.title_en: Europe's heatwave linked to 1,300 deaths, WHO says, as Germany hits record 41.7C
items.title_zh: 世界卫生组织称，欧洲热浪导致 1,300 人死亡，德国气温达到创纪录的 41.7 摄氏度
items.desc_en: WHO chief Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus warned that Europe is not prepared for high temperatures.
items.desc_zh: 世卫组织总干事谭德塞警告称，欧洲尚未做好应对高温的准备。

items.title_en: Three firefighters die battling huge wildfires on Colorado-Utah border
items.title_zh: 三名消防员在科罗拉多州和犹他州边境的巨大野火中丧生
items.desc_en: A number of blazes have been raging across Utah and Colorado, leading both governors to declare states of emergency.
items.desc_zh: 犹他州和科罗拉多州发生多起火灾，导致两国州长宣布进入紧急状态。

items.title_zh: 委内瑞拉地震后33人获救，数千人失踪

items.desc_zh: 周日，该国政治反对派宣传的一个网站上有近 5 万人被列为下落不明。

items.title_zh: 沙特阿拉伯直升机失事 14人死亡
items.desc_en: The aircraft belonged to state oil giant Aramco and the cause of the crash is being investigated.
items.desc_zh: 这架飞机属于国有石油巨头沙特阿美公司，坠机原因正在调查中。

items.title_en: Australian man charged with murder after girl found dead in suitcase in Thailand
items.title_zh: 泰国手提箱内发现女孩尸体，澳大利亚男子被控谋杀
items.desc_en: The 17-year-old's body was found discarded near a railway track on Saturday, police say.
items.desc_zh: 警方称，周六，这名 17 岁男子的尸体被发现被丢弃在铁轨附近。

items.title_en: Some renters say homeownership isn't part of their American Dream: Renting is 'really freeing for me'
items.title_zh: 一些租房者表示，拥有住房并不是他们美国梦的一部分：租房“对我来说真的是一种自由”
items.desc_en: Some no longer see renting as a temporary stop on the path to homeownership but rather a long-term lifestyle choice, reflecting a shift in the American Dream.
items.desc_zh: 一些人不再将租房视为买房道路上的暂时停止，而是一种长期的生活方式选择，反映了美国梦的转变。

items.title_en: IRAs hold trillions more than 401(k) plans — yet people hardly save in them
items.title_zh: IRA 持有的资金比 401(k) 计划多出数万亿美元——但人们却很少在其中存钱
items.desc_en: Investors are increasingly rolling money from 401(k) plans to IRAs. Some observers fear they're exposed to poor investment advice.
items.desc_zh: 投资者越来越多地将资金从 401(k) 计划转入 IRA。一些观察家担心他们会收到糟糕的投资建议。

items.title_en: If you think China needs to dethrone U.S. dollar, you don't understand how it is waging global currency war
items.title_zh: 如果你认为中国需要推翻美元，那你就不明白它是如何发动全球货币战争的
items.desc_en: It's misguided to focus on China's renminbi replacing the U.S. dollar. Beijing is already successfully reducing dependence on a dollar-centric global system.
items.desc_zh: 关注人民币取代美元是错误的。北京已经成功减少了对以美元为中心的全球体系的依赖。

items.title_zh: 载有跳伞员的飞机在法国东部坠毁 11人死亡

items.desc_zh: 当地官员称，飞行员和 10 名乘客在事件中死亡。

items.title_en: Seniors in Medicare are about to get landmark obesity drug coverage — but many may not know it yet

items.title_en: Trump again threatens Iran with annihilation as Kuwait and Bahrain report attacks
items.title_zh: 科威特和巴林报告袭击事件后，特朗普再次威胁要消灭伊朗

items.title_en: US launches strikes on Iran after second shipping attack
items.title_zh: 美国在第二次航运袭击后对伊朗发动打击
items.desc_en: Iran says it has launched retaliatory attacks at US infrastructure in Kuwait and Bahrain.
items.desc_zh: 伊朗表示，它对美国在科威特和巴林的基础设施发动了报复性袭击。

items.title_en: 117 dead dogs found at California 'no-kill' animal rescue - many with gunshot wounds
items.title_zh: 加州“不杀生”动物救援中心发现 117 只死狗，其中许多有枪伤
items.desc_en: Hundreds more animals are still missing from the California facility as investigators continue excavating the grounds.
items.desc_zh: 随着调查人员继续挖掘场地，加州设施中仍有数百只动物失踪。

items.title_en: Tech firms are blaming AI for mega device and console price rises
items.title_zh: 科技公司将大型设备和游戏机价格上涨归咎于人工智能
items.desc_en: Xbox consoles, Nintendo's new Switch 2 and Valve's Steam Deck are just some of the gadgets seeing price hikes in recent months.
items.desc_zh: Xbox 游戏机、任天堂的新 Switch 2 和 Valve 的 Steam Deck 只是近几个月价格上涨的一些小玩意。

items.title_en: Australia to double maximum penalty for platforms in breach of social media ban
items.title_zh: 澳大利亚将对违反社交媒体禁令的平台处以双倍最高罚款
items.desc_en: Children under the age of 16 have been prevented from 10 key social media platforms in Australia since December 2025.
items.desc_zh: 自 2025 年 12 月以来，澳大利亚 10 个主要社交媒体平台已禁止 16 岁以下儿童使用。

items.title_en: Israel strikes southern Lebanon as Hezbollah condemns new deal
items.title_zh: 真主党谴责新协议，以色列袭击黎巴嫩南部
items.desc_en: Strikes have killed at least one person, state media say a day after Lebanon and Israel signed a framework agreement.
items.desc_zh: 黎巴嫩和以色列签署框架协议一天后，官方媒体称，袭击已造成至少一人死亡。

items.title_en: Budapest's first Pride since Orban left power
items.title_zh: 欧尔班下台后布达佩斯的第一次骄傲
items.desc_en: Budapest held its first Pride march since the end of former prime minister Viktor Orban's 16-year government with thousands turning out to celebrate.
items.desc_zh: 布达佩斯举行了自前总理欧尔班·维克多 (Viktor Orban) 16 年政府结束以来的首次骄傲游行，数千人前来庆祝。

items.desc_zh: 德国、丹麦和捷克共和国是创下历史新高的国家之一。

items.title_en: Trump's face is added to select US passports for America's 250th birthday
items.title_zh: 美国250岁生日之际，美国护照上印有特朗普的头像

items.title_en: Why GTA 6 will launch without a disc - and what it means for gamers

items.title_en: Teens who hacked TfL were known to police years before cyber-attack
items.title_zh: 警方在网络攻击发生前几年就知道黑客入侵伦敦交通局的青少年
items.desc_en: Owen Flowers and Thalha Jubair were convicted for their roles in the attack, which led to large costs for Transport for London.
items.desc_zh: 欧文·弗劳尔斯（Owen Flowers）和塔哈·朱贝尔（Thalha Jubair）因参与袭击而被定罪，这给伦敦交通局带来了巨额损失。

items.title_en: Apple hikes MacBook and iPad prices, blaming rising chip costs
items.title_zh: 苹果提高MacBook和iPad价格，归咎于芯片成本上涨
items.desc_en: Apple said it had "never seen a component price increase this much, this quickly".
items.desc_zh: 苹果表示，“从未见过零部件价格上涨如此之快”。

items.title_en: IBM hails new 'block of flats' design breakthrough for ultra tiny chips
items.title_zh: IBM 欢呼超微型芯片的新“公寓”设计突破
items.desc_en: IBM says it has created the world's first known chip tech below 1 nanometre - but it will be some time before it's ready for production.
items.desc_zh: IBM 表示，它已经创造了世界上第一个已知的 1 纳米以下的芯片技术，但距离投入生产还需要一段时间。

items.title_zh: GTA 6 - 关于 Rockstar 的热门游戏您需要了解的一切
items.desc_en: Rockstar's sixth game in the franchise is set to be the biggest game release of the year.
items.desc_zh: Rockstar 系列的第六款游戏将成为今年发行量最大的游戏。

items.title_en: Scientist publishes fresh doubts over Microsoft's quantum claims
items.title_zh: 科学家对微软的量子主张提出新的质疑
items.desc_en: The tech giant has consistently stood by its Majorana chip research despite scepticism from some experts in the field.
items.desc_zh: 尽管该领域的一些专家持怀疑态度，但这家科技巨头始终坚持其马约拉纳芯片研究。

items.title_en: GTA 6 will cost $80 - and physical edition will not contain a disc
items.title_zh: GTA 6 售价 80 美元 - 实体版不包含光盘
items.desc_en: Rockstar has said physical copies of the game will contain a code for a digital download for the game.
items.desc_zh: Rockstar 表示，该游戏的实体副本将包含该游戏的数字下载代码。

items.title_en: Meta halts worker tracking for AI training due to privacy fears
items.title_zh: 由于担心隐私问题，Meta 停止追踪人工智能培训的员工

items.desc_zh: 该公司两个月前才开始跟踪员工的计算机使用情况以获取人工智能培训数据。

items.desc_zh: 苹果否认了其做法反竞争的说法，称许多客户依赖第三方替代品。
